creator: usama.cit@gmail.com
text:
"pkg clean" is removing everything from the cache directory.

"pkg clean" (without any option/argument) removes packages that have been superseded by newer versions, and any packages that are no longer provided. Moreover, in order to remove all the packages from the cache, "pkg clean -a" is used. However, it is observed that even without giving an "-a" option, "pkg clean" is deleting all cached packages including those, which have not been superseded by newer versions yet and are still in use.
